mechanism: Landing zone owners self-service policy exemptions through their bicepparam and a workflow dispatch. The platform does not gate individual exemptions.
why: Deny policies without self-service create a dependency on platform operators — teams route workloads outside the platform, removing them from the policy boundary entirely.

related.note: Hard deny on resource types is viable because exemptions are self-service.
Hard deny on local auth is viable.
Hard deny on weak TLS is viable.
Hard deny on public network access is viable.
Hard deny on cross-tenant replication is viable.
Defender exemptions are a specific application of this mechanism for cost-driven recommendations.
Generated reference file makes self-service exemption authoring user-friendly — no manual portal lookup or hardcoded IDs.

violations: Exemption created directly in Azure portal — no PR record.
Exemption hardcoding an ARM assignment ID instead of referencing policy-assignment-reference.json.
